mapper.select: SELECT admin_no AS admin_no, adminid, passwd, enabled, name, email, mobile, admin_type AS admin_type, fk_hotel_id AS fk_hotel_id, registerday AS registerday, passwd_modify_date AS passwd_modify_date, last_login_date AS last_login_date FROM tbl_admin_security WHERE adminid = #{adminid}

SELECT admin_no AS admin_no, adminid, passwd, enabled, name, email, mobile, admin_type AS admin_type, fk_hotel_id AS fk_hotel_id, registerday AS registerday, passwd_modify_date AS passwd_modify_date, last_login_date AS last_login_date FROM tbl_admin_security WHERE admin_no = #{admin_no}
